title: SSA Combined Disability Processing Time, Monthly, FY2008–FY2015
description: Historical national average combined disability processing (elapsed) time in days, reported monthly, FY2008 through FY2015. Same schema as the FY2016-onwards series; kept separate because SSA publishes the historical span as a frozen file.

columns.name: Fiscal Year
columns.description: Fiscal year label (e.g. 'FY - 2008'); subtotal rows use the 'Total Average' suffix.

columns.name: Month
columns.description: Three-letter calendar month; blank on fiscal-year average rows.

columns.name: Average Processing (elapsed) Time (in Days)
columns.description: Average elapsed processing time that month (or FY average on subtotal rows).

notes: Exclude 'Total Average' subtotal rows from monthly statistics. Concatenate with ssa/cdp-time-monthly-fy16-fy26 for a continuous FY2008–present series.
